facts: Repo exposes folders VLM-MASK-REASONER, config, data_generation, datasets, inference, sample, scripts/cogvideox_fun, videox_fun, requirements.txt. README lists train_void.sh and train_void_warped_noise.sh.
exp50_use: Clone/audit in Milestone B/D; do not modify official source.

facts: VOID targets Video Object and Interaction Deletion: physically plausible counterfactuals where removed objects can alter downstream interactions; training data from Kubric and HUMOTO.
exp50_use: Motivates interaction-aware difference from plain VOR-OR.

facts: Files include void_pass1.safetensors required and void_pass2.safetensors optional; built on CogVideoX-Fun-V1.5-5b-InP; default resolution 384x672, max frames 197; requires 40GB+ VRAM for notebook.
exp50_use: Download Pass1/Pass2 in Milestone B; pass paths to inference.

license_or_status: HF license shown as other; CogVideoX-Fun V1.5 5B InP
facts: Base inpainting model storage listed around 20GB; CogVideoX-Fun supports training DiT / LoRA in its own framework.
